title: Middle Eastern Crumble Potato Hash
description: A delicious and easy-to-make potato hash inspired by the flavors of the Middle East, topped with a crunchy crumble.
instructions: Boil the potatoes until tender, then chop into small pieces.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add the potatoes.
Add the peppery and eastern and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with crumble.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown and the potatoes are crispy.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
